posts: 🐶 A new game in the PunkCity ecosystem 💸 CoinFi — 2x or nothing, TON on-chain — double or nothing (fully powered by smart contracts). Flip a coin! 10% of the project’s profits will go toward $PUNK buybacks. 🕹️ Play CoinFi
💀 SoyJack in District clash 🪛 New disctrict clash Update Uniq Skins for 8 mercanaries - availible through battle Pass Unique SoyJack for 100st level of battle Pass! 🐇 Play District Clash
🇨🇭 The Swiss Alps hold many secrets. An updated version of the well-known Bankenstein. Even TON projects fear his wrath. ⛏ It’s best not to test the power of his hammer.

🧑‍🎄 New Year in District Clash Two new mercenaries — 🎅 Robo Santa and 🍀 The Elf! 🫙 Holiday Drink Miss chance: 10% +2 damage for each Miss effect on the mercenary 🎄 Rocket Launcher Weapon -1 damage Reload 3: Agility 2 🚀 Buy Lootbox

🦇 “Darkness obeys… but never forgets.” 🧛‍♂️ STRIGOI — an ancient curse sealed within the body of a fallen aristocrat who traded life for eternity. 🩸 Even light retreats when he steps out of the shadows.

🎅 TON Punks x Getgems: Secret Santa on TON 💎 As part of the Secret Santa holiday campaign, everyone who plays a free battle in District Clash will receive a lootbox with a random merc. 🎁 100+ Telegram Gifts from TON Punks are added to the community pool. On December 30, all participants will receive random gifts. 🚀 Claim a free lootbox 🌉 Send a gift to Santa

🐇 Mercenary lootboxes are now available in the shop New mercenaries can now be obtained through lootboxes! 💎 How it works: 👈 A random mercenary drops from a lootbox. 👈 If the mercenary is already in your collection, EXP is added to the shared progression pool. 👈 Mercenaries can no longer be purchased separately. 💎 Mercenary drop rates: 70% Common / 25% Rare / 5% Epic. Duplicates → EXP (75 / 150 / 400). 🚀 Buy Lootbox

🐇 Major bonus system update The progression logic for mercenaries in District Clash has been updated. Bonuses no longer drop randomly. The pool of battle items is now formed through a progression tree. 🌳 Skill Tree instead of roulette 👈 Each mercenary now has a unique progression tree. 👈 At the start of a battle, a mercenary receives 2 starting bonuses. 👈 With each round, items from the selected tree become available. 💎 The combat flow remains familiar, only the source of items has changed. 🌉 Progress conversion All bonuses stored in the garage and unopened lootboxes have been converted into mercenary experience. Additionally, players received from 1 to 3 new unique mercenaries: 🎩 Mr Freeman 🌚 Morgan Freeman 🥸 Gordon Freeman 🔥 New bonuses available in the progression tree 🙌 Hypersense Chip: +2 Initiative, +2 max ❤️ 🍟 Junkfood: +1 Initiative, Learn: +7 max ❤️ 🧻 Contract: Learn: +1 🗡, +1 Max ❤️ 🛞 Ping : Blitz / Combo / Last Act: deal 2 🗡 🧱 Bulletproof Vest: +2 Max ❤️, -1 Initiative, Blitz: +1 shield ♋️ Absorb Field: Combo: heal 2 ❤️, +1 shield 🛁 Bubble Gen: Cooldown 3: +1 shield 🧩 Kinetic Field: Reflect 1 (+3 for each shield) 🏝 Voltage Whip: Weapon, Rush: +2 shields 🫲 Helping Hand: Brotherhood: 25% opponent jam ☕️ Rebalance of existing bonuses 🥻 Evasion: 15% opponent jam, +1 Max ❤️ 👢 Kick Boots: -1 Initiative, Taunt: +4 Max ❤️ 🍾 Bullet Frenzy: Combo: deal 4 🗡 🦾 Muscles: +6 Max ❤️ 👁 Adapt: Combo: +3 Max ❤️ 🥶 Freeze Gun: Cooldown 3: opponent jam 100%, deal 2 🗡 🔥 Grenade: Cooldown 2: deal 3 🗡 🩸 Drain Hack: Cooldown 2: lifesteal 3 📱 O.L.M. (Optimus): Taunt: Reflect 3, Stealth: +4 Max ❤️, Neither: +2 temporary max 🗡 🌵 Starting bonuses for mercenaries updated 👩‍🦱 Mom of Three: 🏒 + 🍟 🧘‍♂️ Buddha: 💪 + 👁 😘 Bladerunner Girl: 🫓 + 🛞 💙 Rei: 🔥 + 🪤 🖤 Russel Hobbs: 🪃 + 🍺 🚀 Play District Clash
🧊 “Cold magic wounds deeper than claw or fang.” 🐅 NOTUS is the living storm of Golden Cubes — awakened in the body of a tiger by ancient magic. 🥶 Even ice retreats when it hears his roar.
🧪 “Madness? No. Precise science.” ☠️ Mamba Bamba is the mad alchemist of Golden Cubes, exiled to the swamps after one failed experiment. 🔥 Get ready for an explosion you won’t forget.

🚬 New shop is live in District Clash! Now the shop features weekly and monthly offers with exclusive mercenaries, bundles, and discounts. 💎 Stay tuned for updates so you don’t miss anything. 🚀 Visit the District Clash shop

🐶 TON Punks are now on Hot Craft TON Punks have been officially added to the Hot Craft marketplace by the Hot Wallet team. 💎 Holders can see their NFTs in the portfolio, and new buyers can find the collection right on the main page. 😎 Buy TON Punks NFT

🐇 New mercenary in District Clash: Igor Sinyak 👜 Igor Sinyak 👜 Hermes Handbag Taunt: +3 Initiative +2 Max ❤️ 👄 V.P.C. Taunt + Rush: all allied mercenaries in your district temporarily gain +1 🗡 🚀 Buy the unique mercenary
🐓 “Steel may shatter. Ice remembers.” 🔨 Sigurd, the last blacksmith of the North, will be available at the release of Golden Cubes. ⛏ Prepare for a strike that cannot be stopped.

🐶 TON Punks x ChainSIM: 10% off ChainSIM NFT for all Punks ChainSIM is an NFT-based numbering system launched by our friends. Now everyone can own a unique number that can later be used for various authorizations. Numbers come in different rarities and are traded on the secondary market based on their rarity. 💎 Simply connect a wallet with a TON Punk to mint your SIM with a 10% discount. 😎 Buy TON Punks NFT 🚀 Mint your ChainSIM NFT

🐇 New mercs in District Clash: TB3 & GM08 🪩 TB3 🌎 The World +1 🗡 per attack, resets after reaching +4 🗡 📜 Something vigorous was born inside the new TB3 model. It led its shell through all of the world countries and back to the burning districts. 🪩 GM08 🍀 Lucky Combo: 20% chance to fully restore ❤️, max once per round 📜 One small difference between GM08 and its paired model inverted the logic in its core. It stays away from the streets most of the time, keeping its shell safe. 🟪 Buy unique mercs

🚀 Back to the District! New mercs: Doc & Marty Superconductors didn’t evolve enough for time machines, but they were enough to invent a Hoverboard… and Titanium Armor. 👈 Doc is the first merc with two unique bonuses! 👨‍🦱 Marty 🏂 Hoverboard +30% enemy jam 👨‍🔬 Doc ⬜️ Titanium Plate +5 max ❤️ Bodyguard: -1 🗡 from enemies; 🫙 Plutonium Vial Rush: each attack deals -1 max ❤️ to enemy, +1 Initiative; 🐇 Buy unique mercs

🐇 District Clash x UFO Puzzle: lootboxes for completing missions 💎 Every player can get 2 🧊 and an extra bonus for completing two simple missions. Rewards are available to both new and returning players. 🚬 Claim rewards in UFO Puzzle

🐻 New unique mercenary in District Clash: Cheburator Something deeply uncanny is buried inside each model. The longer you look, the less you understand. 💀 Paralyzing fear Cooldown 2: enemy gets -1 🗡 🚀 Add Cheburator in squad
⚡ ROAARR!!! ⚡ 🦢 Kodi, the Bear is too big for the mine and too mean for the zoo. 💎 Golden Cubes just got heavier.
